title: Copper Tech - Redstone tweaks
description: Replaces some Redstone components' materials with Copper!
body:
![Project Title: "Copper Tech - Redstone Tweaks"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd6edc6f6416e1a3c352f740b543f0af31a13e5d.png)

---
### RESOURCE PACK REQUIRED TO CORRECTLY VIEW ITEMS IN-GAME
[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/T6T81FJU3R)
---
**Copper Tech** is a small Data Pack that enhances the uses of Copper by using it to **replace more expensive ingredients** in various Crafting recipes of Redstone blocks and components.

![Isometric render of the changed textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4dc3856725e388c7019abf69c6ca80ad5204a38b.png)
---
Specifically, Copper Tech's objective is to fill a gap by making Copper more useful, including it in both recipes that use simple materials, and recipes that normally would use more valuable items.
The changed recipes are:
- **Redstone Repeaters** and **Comparators**, replacing Stone.
- **Hoppers**, replacing Iron Ingots.
- **Pistons**, replacing Iron Ingots and Planks.

Take a look at this project's images for the specific Crafting recipes.

---
### Installation and Compatibility

Copper Tech is fully compatible with **MC 1.17 and all its later versions**, including the latest **1.21.8**.
Copper Tech's Resource Pack is also compatible with the Vanilla Tweaks Bedrock parity Piston model.

To properly install Copper Tech, both the Data Pack and the Resource Pack must be installed.

To manually install the Data Pack, simply drop the corresponding .zip file in the 'datapack' folder inside your world folder.
To manually install the required Resource Pack, drop the corresponding .zip file in the 'resourcepacks' folder inside your main MC directory.

Copper Tech is extremely lightweight and is compatible with Multiplayer, as long as the Resource Pack is correctly loaded.

---
### Support 
If you like my Data Packs, Resource Packs or textures, consider **donating**, it would really mean a lot to me. If you are interested in **commissioning** any content, **contact me** on any available platform, I'll try to reach out to you as fast as I can.

**Suggestions** for future Minecraft content are also well received. Thank you for taking a look at my content. :)
